content.text:
Device stuck on keyguard — same pattern as the prior VlcCreatePlaylist run. Cannot proceed.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on the system keyguard (foreground package com.android.systemui, AOD-style dim screen with keyguard_root_view in XML) throughout the session. Multiple unlock swipes, taps, home/back, lock_screen toggles, and open_app(org.videolan.vlc) calls failed to dismiss the keyguard, so VLC could not be brought to the foreground.", "screenshot_paths": ["last get_screenshot returned the dim AOD/keyguard screen showing only the time '16:?' faintly"], "failure_reason": "Unable to bypass the device keyguard via available MCP gestures; foreground package never left com.android.systemui, so VLC could not be opened to create 'Playlist A' or 'Playlist B'."}

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on the system keyguard (foreground package com.android.systemui, AOD-style dim screen with keyguard_root_view in XML) throughout the session. Multiple unlock swipes, taps, home/back, lock_screen toggles, and open_app(org.videolan.vlc) calls failed to dismiss the keyguard, so VLC could not be brought to the foreground.", "screenshot_paths": ["last get_screenshot returned the dim AOD/keyguard screen showing only the time '16:?' faintly"], "failure_reason": "Unable to bypass the device keyguard via available MCP gestures; foreground package never left com.android.systemui, so VLC could not be opened to create 'Playlist A' or 'Playlist B'."}
